snippet.title: Sigma Style - Music Video | Sigma (Tamil) | Jason Sanjay | Sundeep Kishan, Faria Abdullah | Thaman S
snippet.description:
For more latest songs & videos, subscribe 👉 https://bit.ly/Saregama_Tamil

Presenting the first single "Sigma Style" from 'Sigma' starring Sundeep Kishan, Faria Abdullah and others. Directed by Jason Sanjay. Music Composed by Thaman S

Song Credits: 
Sigma Style 
Artists : Thaman S, Smile Tupakeys, Mc Rude
Programmed & Arranged by - Thaman S
Beat & EDM Works - Beyond Sound (T)
Additional Programming - Shashank Alamuru, Osho V, Hari S R, Harshaa
Additional Vocals  - Harsha D 
Carnatic PHRASES - Adviteeya, Vagdevi Prakruthi & Rajani 
Vocal Supervision - Adviteeya V
Recorded at V Studio (CHN) by Osho V & Hari @ Vibe ( HYD )
Mix and Mastered by Shadab Rayeen @ New Edge ( Mumbai )
Assistant engineers - Jazbaat, Sohamm, Suryansh
Musicians Co Ordinator - Manikandan K
Studio Manager - Seenu & Sridhar
Studio Assistance - Raju, Ranjith, Kannan, Lingam & Pawan

Movie Credits:
Cast: Sundeep Kishan, Faria Abdullah, Raju Sundaram, Sampath Raj, Shiv Panditt, Anbu Thasan, Yog Japee, Magalakshmi, Sheela Rajkumar, Kamalesh, Kiran Konda
Director: Jason Sanjay
Music: Thaman S
Editor: Praveen KL
DOP: Krishnan Vasant
Creative Producer: Sanjeev
VFX: Hariharasuthan
Lyricist: Vivek, Super Subbu
Stunt: Venkat, Silva
Stills: Surya
Publicity Designer: Ananth Kancherla
Production Controller: Jai Ganesh B
Makeup: PS Kuppusamy
Art Director: Benjamin M
Costumer - Perumal Selvam
DI: Prasad
Colorist: Ranga
VFX: R Harihara Suthan (Lorven)
Additional screenplay: Kaleel Raja, Sanjeev S, Ajaiy Ashok
DTS/Dolby Mix:
Sound Design: Krishnan Subramanian 
Sound Mixing: S Sivakumar
Sound Design & Mix Studio: A M Studios, Chennai
PRO: Suresh Chandra, Vamsi Shekar
Executive Producer: Subramanian Narayanan 
Head of Lyca Productions: G.K.M. Tamil Kumaran
Produced by Subaskaran

Lyrics: 
Aaye Aaye.. 
Sigma Ma Ma Ma Ma Ma.. 
Sigma Ma Ma Ma Ma Ma.. 
Elarkum Ellam Vedum Life La Ila Sequal 
Thagudhi Tharam Pathu Pesurathu Ila Moral 
Padhavi Mel Asai Ilai Porul Pathu Viral 
Ena Veduvo Elam Kedaiku Thevai Komjam Thedal 
Vazhi Thani Vazhi Andha Andava En Pakkam 
Guniyadhu Thala Never Ever Evanuku 
Mudiyadhunu Onu Illa Na Vecha Istam 
Vidiyathu Machi Nee Mulikura Varaikum 
Avasla Avathu Silent Ah Vela Nadakum 
Veen Vambu Poda Mata Whatever The Vilakam 
Villata Kuda Vitu Povadha Janam Suthi Iruku 
Analu Solva Nama Kadha Nagaru 
Sigma Youngman Riding Solo 
Underground Baby Out Of Control 
Therika Podhu Machi Thiraiyarangam 
Naanga Erangura Edathula Nila Nadukam 
Sigma Youngman Riding Solo 
Underground Baby Out Of Control 
Therika Podhu Machi Thiraiyarangam 
Naanga Erangura Edathula Nila Nadukam 
Pop Pop Pop Pop  
Pop Pop Pop  
Everybody  
Drop Drop Drop  Drop  
Drop Drop Drop  
Let’s Go

Pop Pop Pop  
Everybody  
Drop Drop Drop  Drop  
Drop Drop Drop…   
Hey Check Out Check Out 
The Bad Boy Flow 
Naan Ring’u La Yerangina 
Highlights Yo!

Let’s Go

Pop Pop Pop  
Everybody

Drop Drop Drop…=  
Aaye Aaye.. 
Sigma Ma Ma Ma Ma Ma.. 
Sigma Ma Ma Ma Ma Ma.. 
Sigma Youngman Sigma Youngman 
Sigma Youngman Riding Solo 
Underground Baby Out Of Control 
Therika Podhu Machi Thiraiyarangam 
Naanga Erangura Edathula Nila Nadukam

snippet.title: Cocktail 2 Official Trailer | Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna | In Cinemas 19th June
snippet.description:
From friends to lovers to CHAOS, the perfect 🍸 is back.

#Cocktail2 In Cinemas 19th June. Trailer Out Now.

Directed By: Homi Adajania
Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan, Ankur Garg
Music Director: Pritam
Written by: Tarun Jain, Luv Ranjan
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
Story By: Luv Ranjan
Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja
Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
Lyrics: Amitabh Bhattacharya
Production Design: Arvind Ashok Kumar, Bindiya Chhabria

The race tightens in BMPS 2026 as the Survival Stage heads into Day 3!

All 32 teams, divided into 4 groups, return with one goal - secure a spot in the Semi Finals.

The margins are now razor thin, and every point gained or lost could decide the fate of a team. Only the Top 8 will advance, while the remaining 24 face elimination.
Expect calculated aggression, clutch moments, and teams pushing their limits to stay in the hunt ⚔️🔥

snippet.title: Shararat - Audio | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Shashwat S, Jasmine, Madhubanti, Ayesha, Krystle
snippet.description:
Shararat - this one’s made for the dance floor.

👉 Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:
A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Song Name: Shararat
Music: Shashwat Sachdev
Singers: Madhubanti Bagchi, Jasmine Sandlas
Lyrics: Jasmine Sandlas, Shashwat Sachdev

Lyrics:
Tune parda uthaaya, haaye kya baat ho gayi 
Haaye 
Ye mulakaat, vaardaat ho gayi 
Nain milaaye humne ik dooje se yoon 
Raat hui 
Phir din 
Phir se raat ho gayi 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Kachhi kali sadda maasoom chehra 
Neeyat noorani Sadda dil hai sunehra 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Parde de peeche ki hai Kisnoo pata 
Ik afeemi main chaskha chakhaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan 
Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Aye Haye Tum bhi ho tanha 
Aur hum akele Jo saath huye laajawab ho gaye 
Tum bhi haseen aur hum aashqeen 
Jo raat huyi benaqaab ho gaye 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Mere labon pe saji surkhiyan 
Gulabi ye sharbat pilaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Naina ch mere ik neela samandar 
Naina ch mere ik rangeela samandar 
Iss samandar mein dubki lawaanwan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan 
Tennu shararat sikhaanwan Jaddon naina ladaawan

#Shararat
#dhurandhar 
#ranveersingh 
#shashwatsachdev 
#madhubantibagchi 
#JasmineSandlas

snippet.title: Bharat Bhhagya Viddhaata | The Unseen Heroes | Trailer | Kangana Ranaut | In Cinemas 12th June
snippet.description:
The headlines remembered the terror.
History forgot the heroes.

When terror struck,
they chose courage.

This is their story.

TRAILER OUT NOW.

🇮🇳 BHARAT BHHAGYA VIDDHAATA 🇮🇳
The Unseen Heroes 

IN CINEMAS 12TH JUNE. 🎬 🇮🇳

Dr. Jayantilal Gada (PEN STUDIOS) Presents 
Manikarnika Films,Paramhans Creations, Eunoia Films and Floating Rocks Entertainment

snippet.title: Ucha Lamba Kad Forever | Welcome to the Jungle | Akshay Kumar | Disha Patani | Vikram M | 26th June
snippet.description:
Presenting Ucha Lamba Kad Forever, the latest song from Welcome To The Jungle ❤️🎶 The melody that became everyone’s favourite is back to make you sing, dance, and vibe all over again. Bringing back the charm, nostalgia, and the magic of a song that has lived in playlists and hearts for years.

Starring: Akshay Kumar, Suniel Shetty, Disha Patani, Jacqueline Fernandez, Arshad Warsi, Jackie Shroff, Paresh Rawal, Raveena Tandon, Lara Dutta, Farida Jalal, Johny Lever, Shreyas Talpade, Tusshar Kapoor, Rajpal Yadav, Krushna Abhishek, Kiku Sharda, Daler Mehndi, Aftab Shivdasani, Mukesh Tiwari, Yashpal Sharma, Kiran Kumar, Zakir Hussain, Vindu Dara Singh, Urvashi Rautela, Hemant Pandey, Brijendra Kala, Feroze Khan(Arjun), Late Pankaj Dheer ji, Puneet Issar, Sudesh Berry, Jeetu Verma, Vrihi Kodvara, Adityaa Singgh, Bhagya Bhanushali

snippet.title: FALL 2: DEADPOINT (2026) Official Trailer - Harriet Slater, Arsema Thomas
snippet.description:
Fall 2: Deadpoint - only in theaters September 2. Starring Harriet Slater, Arsema Thomas, Tom Brittney, Virginia Gardner, and Grace Caroline Currey. Directed by The Spierig Brothers. 

Subscribe to the LIONSGATE: YouTube Channel for the latest movie trailers, clips, and more: https://bit.ly/2Z6nfym

https://www.lionsgate.com/movies/
https://www.facebook.com/lionsgate
https://twitter.com/lionsgate
https://www.instagram.com/lionsgate/
https://www.tiktok.com/@lionsgate

#FALLMOVIE

After losing her fearless sister Hunter, a deeply damaged Jax sets out on a dangerous climb with Hunter’s old friend to honor her memory. As they tightrope walk the perilous planks of Mount Kwan, a terrifying rockslide leaves them stranded 5,000 feet above ground. In the face of vertigo-inducing sequences, dark truths, and cruel twists, Jax must confront her deepest fears head-on to fight for survival and closure.

snippet.title: सुपरगर्ल (Supergirl) | Final Hindi Trailer
snippet.description:
देखिये 'सुपरगर्ल' का नया रोमांचक हिंदी ट्रेलर। आ रही है आपके नज़दीकी सिनेमाघरों में जून २६ से। In English, Hindi, Tamil & Telugu. Also in IMAX & 3D.

Website: www.warnerbros-india.com
Facebook:   / warnerbrosindia  
Instagram:   / warnerbrosindia  
X: https://x.com/WarnerBrosIndia

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in Cinemas and IMAX ® across India on June 26, 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

#WarnerBrosIndia #Supergirl #SupergirlHindiTrailer

de-DE.title: Supergirl | Finaler Hindi-Trailer
de-DE.description:
देखिये 'सुपरगर्ल' का नया रोमांचक हिंदी ट्रेलर। आ रही है आपके नज़दीकी सिनेमाघरों में जून २६ से। In Englisch, Hindi, Tamil und Telugu. Auch in IMAX und 3D.

Website: www.warnerbros-india.com
Facebook: /warnerbrosindia
Instagram: /warnerbrosindia
X: https://x.com/WarnerBrosIndia

„Supergirl“, der neueste Kinofilm von DC Studios, kommt diesen Sommer weltweit in die Kinos. Verleiht wird der Film von Warner Bros. Pictures. Milly Alcock spielt die Doppelrolle von Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Regie führte Craig Gillespie nach einem Drehbuch von Ana Nogueira.

Als ein unerwarteter und skrupelloser Gegner ihr zu nahe kommt, verbündet sich Kara Zor-El, alias Supergirl, widerwillig mit einer ungewöhnlichen Verbündeten auf einer epischen, interstellaren Reise voller Rache und Gerechtigkeit.

Neben Milly Alcock spielen Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham und Jason Momoa.

Die DC Studios-Chefs Peter Safran und James Gunn produzieren den Film „Supergirl“, der auf DC-Charakteren basiert, deren Figur von Jerry Siegel und Joe Shuster erschaffen wurde. Als Executive Producer fungieren Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo und Lars P. Winther. Hinter der Kamera arbeitet Craig Gillespie mit Kameramann Rob Hardy, Produktionsdesigner Neil Lamont, Cutterin Tatiana S. Riegel, den Kostümbildnern Anna B. Sheppard und Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, Music Supervisor Susan Jacobs und Komponistin Claudia Sarne zusammen.

DC Studios präsentiert eine Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Produktion: „Supergirl“, ein Film von Craig Gillespie, der am 26. Juni 2026 in den Kinos und IMAX® in ganz Indien zu sehen sein wird. Der Film wird von Warner Bros. Pictures vertrieben.

#WarnerBrosIndia #Supergirl #SupergirlHindiTrailer

id.title: Supergirl | Trailer Hindi Terakhir
id.description:
Jawaban 'सुपरगर्ल'' ट्रेलर। आज़दीकी सिनेमाघरों में जून २६ से। Dalam bahasa Inggris, Hindi, Tamil & Telugu. Juga dalam format IMAX & 3D.

Situs web: www.warnerbros-india.com
Facebook: /warnerbrosindia
Instagram: /warnerbrosindia
X: https://x.com/WarnerBrosIndia

“Supergirl,” film terbaru DC Studios yang akan tayang di layar lebar, akan diputar di bioskop seluruh dunia musim panas ini dari Warner Bros. Pictures, dibintangi oleh Milly Alcock dalam peran ganda Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie menyutradarai film ini berdasarkan skenario karya Ana Nogueira.

Ketika musuh yang tak terduga dan kejam menyerang terlalu dekat, Kara Zor-El, alias Supergirl, dengan enggan bergabung dengan seorang pendamping yang tak terduga dalam perjalanan epik antarbintang untuk membalas dendam dan menegakkan keadilan.

Alcock beradu akting dengan Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, dan Jason Momoa.

Kepala DC Studios, Peter Safran dan James Gunn, memproduseri film ini, yang berdasarkan karakter-karakter dari DC, Supergirl, yang diciptakan oleh Jerry Siegel dan Joe Shuster. Film ini diproduseri eksekutif oleh Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo, dan Lars P. Winther. Di balik kamera, Gillespie didampingi oleh sutradara fotografi Rob Hardy, perancang produksi Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, perancang kostum Anna B. Sheppard dan Michael Mooney, pengawas efek visual Geoffrey Baumann, pengawas musik Susan Jacobs, dan komposer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios mempersembahkan sebuah produksi Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company, sebuah film karya Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” yang akan tayang di bioskop dan IMAX ® di seluruh India pada 26 Juni 2026, didistribusikan oleh Warner Bros. Pictures.

#WarnerBrosIndia #Supergirl #SupergirlHindiTrailer

it.title: Supergirl | Trailer finale in hindi
it.description:
देखिये 'सुपरगर्ल' का नया रोमांचक हिंदी ट्रेलर। आ रही है आपके नज़दीकी सिनेमाघरों में जून २६ से। In inglese, hindi, tamil e telugu. Anche in IMAX e 3D.

Sito web: www.warnerbros-india.com
Facebook: /warnerbrosindia
Instagram: /warnerbrosindia
X: https://x.com/WarnerBrosIndia

"Supergirl", il nuovo lungometraggio dei DC Studios, arriverà nelle sale cinematografiche di tutto il mondo quest'estate, distribuito da Warner Bros. Pictures, con Milly Alcock nel doppio ruolo di Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Il film è diretto da Craig Gillespie e la sceneggiatura è di Ana Nogueira.

Quando un avversario inaspettato e spietato colpisce troppo vicino a casa, Kara Zor-El, alias Supergirl, si unisce a malincuore a un improbabile compagno in un epico viaggio interstellare alla ricerca di vendetta e giustizia.

Alcock recita al fianco di Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham e Jason Momoa.


I dirigenti dei DC Studios, Peter Safran e James Gunn, producono il film, basato sui personaggi DC, in particolare su Supergirl, creata da Jerry Siegel e Joe Shuster. I produttori esecutivi sono Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo e Lars P. Winther. Dietro la macchina da presa, Gillespie è affiancato dal direttore della fotografia Rob Hardy, dallo scenografo Neil Lamont, dalla montatrice Tatiana S. Riegel, dai costumisti Anna B. Sheppard e Michael Mooney, dal supervisore degli effetti visivi Geoffrey Baumann, dalla supervisore musicale Susan Jacobs e dalla compositrice Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios presenta una produzione Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company, un film di Craig Gillespie, "Supergirl", che uscirà nelle sale cinematografiche e IMAX® in tutta l'India il 26 giugno 2026, distribuito da Warner Bros. Pictures.

#WarnerBrosIndia #Supergirl #SupergirlHindiTrailer

snippet.title: Mere Haal Par – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Mere Haal Par – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Na jawaab de…
na sawaal kar…
mujhe chhod de
mere haal par.

Tujhe kya milega
mujhe tod kar…
hum to pehle hi
andar se bikhar chuke hain.

Mohabbat ne
itna tanha kar diya…
ab kisi se
shikayat bhi nahi hoti.

“Mere Haal Par”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo dard me bhi
khamoshi se jeena seekh gaya.

Is gaane mein
dard bhi hai,
tanhai bhi,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo dheere se kehta hai —

mujhe chhod do
mere haal par…

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi se
beinteha mohabbat ki ho
aur badle mein sirf dard mila ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

Robin Hood si chhavi thari, manne suni saare gaama me

Thare theke se Dabwali me, aur site se Gurgaama me
Aa Panchkula aur Mahendragarh tak, kaam nahi se rukan ka

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

snippet.title: Raakh - Official Trailer | Ali Fazal, Sonali Bendre, Aamir Bashir, Rakesh Bedi | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Raakh Official Trailer 
Starring Ali Fazal, Sonali Bendre, Aamir Bashir, Akash Makhija, Ramandeep Yadav, Divya Sharma, Vivaan Sharma, Anshul Chauhan, Rakesh Bedi, Dibyendu Bhattacharya
Directed by Prosit Roy, Anusha Nandakumar, Sandeep Saket
Co directors: Anusha & Sandeep
Written by Anusha Nandakumar, Sandeep Saket
Produced by Endemol Shine India BhaDiPa

Official Release Date - June 12, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Raakh is a haunting crime investigation that begins with the disappearance and murder of two teenagers in Delhi. Set in 1978, when such brutality was rare and shocking, the series follows the relentless manhunt launched to track down the killers while exploring the disturbing psyche of the men behind the crime.                                         

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

1976 ലെ പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമത്തിലെ സെക്ഷൻ 107 പ്രകാരം പകർപ്പവകാശ നിരാകരണം, വിമർശനം, അഭിപ്രായം, വാർത്താ റിപ്പോർട്ടിംഗ്, അധ്യാപനം, സ്കോളർഷിപ്പ്, വിദ്യാഭ്യാസം, ഗവേഷണം തുടങ്ങിയ ആവശ്യങ്ങൾക്ക് "ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗത്തിന്" അനുമതി നൽകിയിട്ടുണ്ട്.

പകർപ്പവകാശ നിയമങ്ങൾ അനുവദിക്കുന്ന ഒരു ഉപയോഗമാണ് ന്യായമായ ഉപയോഗം, അല്ലാത്തപക്ഷം അത് ലംഘിക്കപ്പെടാം.

pa.description:
ਨਵੇਂ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਲਈ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ
ਰੋਬਲੋਕਸ ਵੀਡੀਓਜ਼ ਲਈ @OPGamerBlox ਨੂੰ ਸਬਸਕ੍ਰਾਈਬ ਕਰੋ ❤️

🤗 ਇੰਸਟਾਗ੍ਰਾਮ 'ਤੇ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਲਣ ਕਰੋ: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/ 

ਮੈਨੂੰ ਉਮੀਦ ਹੈ ਕਿ ਤੁਹਾਨੂੰ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਪਸੰਦ ਆਇਆ ਹੋਵੇਗਾ, ਤਾਂ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਕੇ ਵੀਡੀਓ ਨੂੰ ਲਾਈਕ ਅਤੇ ਸ਼ੇਅਰ ਕਰੋ। 

ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਅਸਵੀਕਾਰਨ 1976 ਦੇ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਐਕਟ ਦੀ ਧਾਰਾ 107 ਦੇ ਤਹਿਤ, ਆਲੋਚਨਾ, ਟਿੱਪਣੀ, ਖ਼ਬਰਾਂ ਦੀ ਰਿਪੋਰਟਿੰਗ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ, ਸਕਾਲਰਸ਼ਿਪ, ਸਿੱਖਿਆ ਅਤੇ ਖੋਜ ਵਰਗੇ ਉਦੇਸ਼ਾਂ ਲਈ "ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ" ਦੀ ਆਗਿਆ ਹੈ।

ਨਿਰਪੱਖ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਕਾਪੀਰਾਈਟ ਕਾਨੂੰਨਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਆਗਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਾਪਤ ਵਰਤੋਂ ਹੈ ਜੋ ਹੋਰ ਉਲੰਘਣਾ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੀ ਹੈ।

te.title: చివరికి ఫార్జా హొరైజన్ 6లో మెక్లారెన్ P1 కొనేశాను 🤑 | ఖరీదైనది
te.description:
కొత్త వీడియోల కోసం దయచేసి సబ్స్క్రైబ్ చేయండి

రోబ్లాక్స్ వీడియోల కోసం @OPGamerBlox కు సబ్స్క్రైబ్ చేయండి ❤️

🤗 నన్ను ఇన్‌స్టాగ్రామ్‌లో అనుసరించండి: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

మీకు ఈ వీడియో నచ్చిందని ఆశిస్తున్నాను, నచ్చితే దయచేసి వీడియోను లైక్ చేసి, షేర్ చేయండి.

1976 కాపీరైట్ చట్టంలోని సెక్షన్ 107 ప్రకారం, విమర్శ, వ్యాఖ్య, వార్తా నివేదన, బోధన, పాండిత్యం, విద్య మరియు పరిశోధన వంటి ప్రయోజనాల కోసం "న్యాయమైన ఉపయోగం" అనుమతించబడుతుంది.

న్యాయమైన ఉపయోగం అనేది కాపీరైట్ చట్టాల ద్వారా అనుమతించబడిన ఒక ఉపయోగం, లేకపోతే అది ఉల్లంఘన కావచ్చు.

영상이 마음에 드셨다면 좋아요와 공유 부탁드립니다.

본 영상은 1976년 저작권법 제107조에 따라 비판, 논평, 뉴스 보도, 교육, 학술 연구 등의 목적으로 "공정 사용"이 허용됨을 명시합니다.

공정 사용은 저작권법에 의해 허용되는 사용으로, 그렇지 않을 경우 저작권 침해에 해당될 수 있습니다.

bn.title: অবশেষে FORZA HORIZON 6-এ MCLAREN P1 কিনলাম 🤑 | ব্যয়বহুল
bn.description:
নতুন ভিডিওর জন্য অনুগ্রহ করে সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন
রোবলক্স ভিডিওর জন্য @OPGamerBlox-কে সাবস্ক্রাইব করুন ❤️

🤗 আমাকে ইনস্টাগ্রামে ফলো করুন: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

আশা করি ভিডিওটি আপনাদের ভালো লেগেছে। যদি ভালো লেগে থাকে, অনুগ্রহ করে ভিডিওটি লাইক ও শেয়ার করুন।

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহার"-এর অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত এমন একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

hi.title: आखिरकार FORZA HORIZON 6 में MCLAREN P1 खरीद ली 🤑| महंगी
hi.description:
नए वीडियो के लिए सब्सक्राइब करें
रोब्लॉक्स वीडियो के लिए @OPGamerBlox को सब्सक्राइब करें ❤️

🤗 मुझे इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

आशा है आपको वीडियो पसंद आया होगा। अगर पसंद आया तो कृपया लाइक और शेयर करें।

कॉपीराइट अधिनियम 1976 की धारा 107 के तहत कॉपीराइट अस्वीकरण: आलोचना, टिप्पणी, समाचार रिपोर्टिंग, शिक्षण, छात्रवृत्ति, शिक्षा और अनुसंधान जैसे उद्देश्यों के लिए "उचित उपयोग" की अनुमति दी गई है।

उचित उपयोग कॉपीराइट कानूनों द्वारा अनुमत एक ऐसा उपयोग है जो अन्यथा उल्लंघनकारी हो सकता है।

bn.description:
পপি প্লেটাইম চ্যাপ্টার ৬ টিজার ট্রেলার রিঅ্যাকশন সম্পূর্ণ গেমপ্লে (হিন্দি)

পপি প্লেটাইম চ্যাপ্টার ৫
আশা করি ভিডিওটি আপনাদের ভালো লাগবে এবং আপনারা এটি উপভোগ করবেন :)
______________________
💙 আজকের ভিডিওটির অনুপ্রেরণার জন্য এই অসাধারণ নির্মাতাদের জানাই অশেষ ধন্যবাদ ও কৃতজ্ঞতা:

১৯৭৬ সালের কপিরাইট আইনের ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি, শিক্ষা এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে।

ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে।

snippet.title: Lava Granny in Granny Chapter 1 - Door Escape | Shiva and Kanzo Gameplay
snippet.description:
Aaj Shiva aur Kanzo milkar Lava Granny ke ghar se Door Escape kar rahe hai. Is video mein aapko milega dher saara fun, suspense aur mazedaar gameplay jo aap puri mauj ke saath dekh sakte hain.


DISCLAIMER

This video is for entertainment purposes only. It may contain frightening scenes and jump scares. Individuals with weak hearts and young children are advised to stay away.
It bears no resemblance to any actual events, persons, or places.
We do not promote violence of any kind.


#LavaGranny #GrannyEscape

it.title: Lava Granny in Granny Capitolo 1 - Fuga dalla porta | Gameplay di Shiva e Kanzo
it.description:
Oggi, Shiva e Kanzo collaborano per fuggire dalla casa di Nonna Lava. Questo video è ricco di divertimento, suspense e un gameplay fantastico che ti piacerà sicuramente.

AVVISO

Questo video è a scopo puramente di intrattenimento. Potrebbe contenere scene spaventose e momenti di paura improvvisi. Si consiglia la visione a persone sensibili e bambini piccoli.

Non ha alcuna somiglianza con eventi, persone o luoghi reali.

Non promuoviamo la violenza di alcun tipo.

#LavaGranny #GrannyEscape

de-DE.title: Lava-Granny in Granny Chapter 1 – Flucht durch die Tür | Shiva und Kanzo Gameplay
de-DE.description:
Heute arbeiten Shiva und Kanzo zusammen, um aus Lava Grannys Haus zu entkommen. Dieses Video bietet jede Menge Spaß, Spannung und fantastisches Gameplay.

HINWEIS

Dieses Video dient ausschließlich der Unterhaltung. Es kann gruselige Szenen und Schreckmomente enthalten. Für ängstigende Personen und Kinder ist es nicht geeignet.

Es hat keinerlei Ähnlichkeit mit realen Ereignissen, Personen oder Orten.

Wir verherrlichen keinerlei Gewalt.

#LavaGranny #GrannyEscape

fr-FR.title: Lava Granny dans Granny Chapitre 1 - Évasion par la porte | Gameplay de Shiva et Kanzo
fr-FR.description:
Aujourd'hui, Shiva et Kanzo font équipe pour s'échapper de la maison de Mamie Lave. Cette vidéo est pleine d'action, de suspense et d'un gameplay exceptionnel !

AVERTISSEMENT

Cette vidéo est uniquement destinée au divertissement. Elle peut contenir des scènes effrayantes et des sursauts. Âmes sensibles et jeunes enfants sont déconseillés.

Cette vidéo ne ressemble en aucun cas à des événements, des personnes ou des lieux réels.

Nous ne cautionnons aucune forme de violence.

#LaMamieLaVa #ÉvasionDeMamie

id.title: Lava Granny di Granny Chapter 1 - Kabur Lewat Pintu | Gameplay Shiva dan Kanzo
id.description:
Hari ini, Shiva dan Kanzo bekerja sama untuk melarikan diri dari rumah Lava Granny. Video ini penuh dengan keseruan, ketegangan, dan permainan yang luar biasa yang dapat Anda nikmati.

PERINGATAN

Video ini hanya untuk tujuan hiburan. Video ini mungkin mengandung adegan menakutkan dan kejutan mendadak. Anak-anak kecil dan yang memiliki jantung berdebar disarankan untuk menjauh.

Video ini tidak menyerupai peristiwa, orang, atau tempat nyata mana pun.

Kami tidak mempromosikan kekerasan dalam bentuk apa pun.

#LavaGranny #GrannyEscape

pt-BR.title: Vovó Lava no Capítulo 1 de Granny - Fuga pela Porta | Gameplay de Shiva e Kanzo
pt-BR.description:
Hoje, Shiva e Kanzo estão trabalhando juntos para escapar da casa da Vovó Lava. Este vídeo está repleto de diversão, suspense e jogadas incríveis que você vai adorar.

AVISO

Este vídeo é apenas para fins de entretenimento. Pode conter cenas assustadoras e sustos repentinos. Recomenda-se que crianças pequenas e pessoas com problemas cardíacos não assistam.

Não se assemelha a nenhum evento, pessoa ou lugar real.

Não promovemos violência de qualquer tipo.

#VovóLava #FugaDaVovó

es-US.title: Lava Granny en Granny Capítulo 1 - Escape por la puerta | Gameplay de Shiva y Kanzo
es-US.description:
Hoy, Shiva y Kanzo colaboran para escapar de la casa de la Abuela de Lava. Este video está lleno de diversión, suspenso y una jugabilidad increíble que podrás disfrutar.

ADVERTENCIA

Este video es solo para fines de entretenimiento. Puede contener escenas aterradoras y sustos repentinos. Se recomienda a las personas sensibles y a los niños pequeños que se mantengan alejados.

No guarda ninguna semejanza con eventos, personas o lugares reales.

No promovemos la violencia de ningún tipo.

#LavaGranny #GrannyEscape

snippet.description:

Lyricist: Sameer

Movie Cast & Crew :

Director: Kundan Shah

Hey Hey Hey Hey Hey
Aa Aa Aa Aa Aa

Aa Aa Aa Aa Aa

Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke

Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke

Dil Chura Liya
Maine Ikraar Karke

Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke 

Mere Diljaani Mere
Maahi Mere Dholna 
Koi Sun Lega Zara
Dheere Dheere Bolna 
Haan, Ishq Kiya Hai Maine
Chori Nahin Ki Hai 
Tere Sang Yaara
Jora Jori Nahin Ki Hai 

Chain Le Liya
Maine Beqaraar Karke 
Beqaraar Karke, Beqaraar Karke 
Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke
Tumse Pyaar Karke

Beech Safar Mein Kahin
Mera Saath Chhodke 
Tujhko Kasam Hai
Naiyyo Jaana Dil Todke 
Kaise Main Bataaoon Tujhe
Kaisa Mera Haal Ve 
Jeena Marna Hai Sab
Ab Tere Naal Ve 

Tujhko Paa Liya
Tera Intezaar Karke 
Intezaar Karke, Intezaar Karke
Dil Laga Liya
Maine Tumse Pyaar Karke 
Tumse Pyaar Karke, Tumse Pyaar Karke

bn.title: TAG #১ ডমিনেশন! 🔥 মিথ-এর ধারাবাহিকতা অবিশ্বাস্য
bn.description:
📷 ইনস্টাগ্রাম - https://www.instagram.com/mrspike10/

ডিসকর্ডে আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন 👇
https://discord.com/invite/2pejjUbCKj

▶️ দ্বিতীয় চ্যানেল - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCasVrVp-Lr0ynmxFeXRG3oQ

📧mrspikeinquiry@gmail.com

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

✅কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহারের ক্ষেত্রে ফেয়ার ইউজের (ন্যায্য ব্যবহার) পাল্লা ভারী থাকে।

✅ভিডিও গেম ডিসক্লেইমার: এই ভিডিওর বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক ব্যবহারের জন্য। গেমপ্লেটি হলো Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI) নামক একটি ভিডিও গেম এবং এটি একটি কাল্পনিক সৃষ্টি।

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
✅যারা আমার ভিডিও দেখেন, লাইক, শেয়ার এবং কমেন্ট করেন, তাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ। আপনাদের কাছে এটি হয়তো একটি ছোট বিষয় মনে হতে পারে, কিন্তু আমি আপনাদের প্রত্যেককে আন্তরিকভাবে ধন্যবাদ জানাই। আপনাদের দেওয়া সমস্ত মতামত এবং মন্তব্যই আমাদের চ্যানেলকে আজকের এই পর্যায়ে নিয়ে আসতে সাহায্য করেছে।
তাই আবারও, আপনাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ!!! 😍

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

Singer(s): Atif Aslam, Shreya Ghoshal
Music Director: Sachin Gupta

Movie Cast & Crew:

snippet.title: Kasam Khake Kaho - Lyrical | Preity Zinta | Arjun Rampal | Mahima | Kumar Sanu | Alka Yagnik
snippet.description:
Song Credits :
Singer(s) : Alka Yagnik & Kumar Sanu
Music Director : Nadeem Shravan
Lyricist : Sameer

Lyrics :

Hey Hey Hey Aa Ha Ha...
Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho, Dil Lagake Kaho Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai 
 
Sharmake Kaho Balkhake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai
 
Ek Ajab See Dil Me Hasrat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Chahe Tumko Dil Me Chahat Hotee Hai Tumko Dekhke
Hame Pyar Karo, Ikrar Karo, Sanso Me Basake Rakh Lo
Tum Sham-O-Saher Didar Karo, Khwabo Me Chhupake Rakh Lo
 
Najar Jhukake Kaho, Palak Uthake Kaho
Ha Kaho Naa Kaho, Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Ek Bechainee See Hotee Hai, Abb Toh Tere Nam Se
Ishk Huwa Jab Se Naa Gujra Ek Lamha Aaram Se
Kya Hal Huwa Chahat Me Sanam, Mushkil Hai Tumse Kuchh Kehna
Hai Tumko Kasam Mehbub Kabhee, Aankho Se Dur Naa Rehna
Itrake Kaho, Jhilmilake Kaho, Ha Kaho Naa Kaho Bas Kehtee Raho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

Kasam Khake Kaho Muskurake Kaho
Han Kaho Naa Kaho, Pas Aake Kaho
Tumko Humse Pyar Hai

#KasamKhakeKaho #DilHaiTumhaara #PreityZinta #ArjunRampal #AlkaYagnik #KumarSanu #MahimaChaudhary

snippet.title: NASHA PATTA : VEET BALJIT (Full Video) Jagjeet Sandhu | Oye Bhole Oye 2 | Latest Punjabi Songs 2026
snippet.description:
Geet MP3 & Jagjeet Sandhu present the full video of "Nasha Patta" from "Oye Bhole Oye 2", sung by Veet Baljit. Written by Veet Baljit himself and brought to life with soulful music by Magic, this beautiful Punjabi duet carries a classic old-school vibe, heartfelt lyrics, and timeless melodies that celebrate the charm of traditional Punjabi romance.

""Oye Bhole Oye 2" - Full Movie releasing on 12th June, 2026 in Cinemas.

Song Credits: 

Title: Nasha Patta
Singer: Veet Baljit, Parveen Bharta
Lyrics: Veet Baljit

Editor: The King

snippet.title: मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
snippet.description:
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा | Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha Apne Vrindavan Ko | Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan

#radhakrishna #radhabhajan #krishnabhajan #radharani 
मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा
mohe brij ko baniyo mor
राधे मोहे ब्रज को बनाइयो मोर 
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ko
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ka
mohe mor banaiyo radha kratika thakur
mohe mor banaiyo radha ringtone
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne
mohe mor banaiyo radha rani
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vrindavan ko song
mohe mor banaiyo radha bhajan
mohe mor banaiyo radha radha
mohe mor banaiyo radha film
mohe mor banaiyo radha apne vindavan ko bhumika sharma 
radha hit bhajan mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo vrindavan ko, peaceful radha krishna bhajan, mohe mor banaiyo radha, mohe mor banaiyo bhajan, farmani naaz mohe mor bhanaiyo radha, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, मोहे मोर बनाइय्यो राधा, radha krishna bhajan, radha krishna bhajan 2026, mohe mor banaiyo farmani naaz, mohe mor banaiyo to banaiyo, aagle janam radha morni banaiyo, mohe mor banaiyo, popul;er bhajan mohe mor, aagle janam radha sadhu banaiyo, aagle janam radha bander banaiyo, 

Lose yourself in the sacred lanes of Vrindavan with this soulful rendition: "Mohe Mor Banaiyo Radha." This Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan captures the deep desire of a devotee to become a peacock in the gardens of Nidhivan, just to be close to Radha Rani and Krishna.

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Bajao Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा - वृंदावन की इस पावन धुन में खो जाएँ। Bajao Bhakti आपके लिए लेकर आया है श्री राधा-कृष्ण की महिमा का एक ऐसा भजन जो आपके हृदय को शांति और आनंद से भर देगा।

यह मधुर और भावपूर्ण Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan ब्रज की पावन भावना और राधा-कृष्ण के दिव्य प्रेम को समर्पित है।
“मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधाअपने वृंदावन को” – यह पंक्ति भक्त की उस विनम्र प्रार्थना को दर्शाती है, जहाँ वह ब्रजधाम में मोर बनकर भी राधा-कृष्ण के चरणों में रहना चाहता है।

यह भजन ध्यान, जप, सुबह-शाम की पूजा, वृंदावन भक्ति, कीर्तन और मन की शांति के लिए अत्यंत उपयुक्त है। इसकी शांत धुन और प्रेमपूर्ण शब्द आत्मा को सुकून देते हैं और मन को वृंदावन की गलियों में ले जाते हैं।

Vrindavan Essence: Experience the 'Brij Ras' from the comfort of your home.

Soulful Peace: Perfect for morning meditation or evening relaxation.

📌 Keywords: Mohe Mor Banaiyo To Banaiyo Vrindavan Ko, मोहे मोर बनइय्यो राधा, Peaceful Radha Krishna Bhajan, Vrindavan Bhajan, Radha Krishna Song 2026, Bunty Thakur Bhajan, Krishna Meditation Music, Radha Rani Bhajan, Braj Bhakti Song

snippet.title: Jignesh Barot | Dil Ma Aag Lagai | દિલ માં આગ લગાઈ | New Gujarati Song 2026
snippet.description:
@SaregamaGujarati  રજૂ કરે છે "Dil Ma Aag Lagai", Jignesh Barot ના શક્તિશાળી અવાજમાં ગાયેલું એક સુંદર અને ભાવનાત્મક ગુજરાતી ગીત.

Credits:

Singer: Jignesh Barot 
Producer: Red Velvet Cinema
Music: Ravi Nagar, Rahul Nadiya
Lyrics: Darshan baazigar 
Dop: Rut Patel 
Editor & colorist: Devang patni 
Creative Producer: Dhyey Films & Team
Artist: Jignesh Barot , jinal raval, Nirav bhrambhatt, Sohan Patel , Meera bhayni
Group artist: Radha Ben 
Makeup: Lata Patel
Hair: yogesh 
Production: Sanjay Rajput 
Light: Kalpesh Jadav 
Concept & Director : Mayur Mehta 
Technical Support: Jenish Talaviya
Sound: Sunil kachhiya 
Sport: vinod vaghela, gunvant 
Art: manish patel
Jignesh Barot Costume: Ekta J Barot
Special Thnx: J D Bapu

Lyrics:

હો આંખે ના જોઈ શકું આખરી વિદાઈ
તને મળી જીંદગી મને મળી જુદાઈ 
પારકું પાનેતર ઓઢી આઈ કેવી કરી તે બેવફાઈ
મારા દિલ માં આગ લગાઈ કેવી કરી તે બેવફાઈ
જીગા ના દિલ માં આગ લગાઈ
હો જીંદગી ભર નો પ્રેમ પલ માં ભૂલી જાશે
કેમ ના વિચાર્યું તે મારું શું થાશે
હો તારા વગર જીગા ને કેમ નું જીવાશે
મારું પણ મૌત જોજે કમોતે થાશે
તું બદલાણી જીંદગી રાખમાં રોલાણી
પાગલ આ પ્રેમ ની વેદના ના જાણી
પારકું પાનેતર ઓઢી આઈ  કેવી કરી તે બેવફાઈ
મારા દિલ માં આગ લગાઈ કેવી કરી તે બેવફાઈ
જીગા ના દિલ માં આગ લગાઈ
હો દૌલત ના હોય તો બેવફાઈ મળે છે
રૂપિયો જોઈ પ્રેમ હર કોઈ કરે છે
દિલ ને સમજનાર કોઈ ક્યાં મળે છે
હાચો પ્રેમ જગત માં કોઈ ક્યાં કરે છે
ઠુકરાયો પ્યાર કેમ તે યાર
પરણી બીજા હારે બાંધ્યો સંસાર
પારકું પાનેતર ઓઢી આઈ કેવી કરી તે બેવફાઈ
મારા દિલ માં આગ લગાઈ કેવી કરી તે બેવફાઈ
જીગા ના દિલ માં આગ લગાઈ

#DilMaAagLagai
#jigneshbarot 
#saregamagujarati
#gujaratisongs   
#gujaratilovesong  
#gujarati 
#ગુજરાતીગીત

પારકું પાનેતર ઓઢી આઈ  કેવી કરી તે બેવફાઈ
મારા દિલ માં આગ લગાઈ કેવી કરી તે બેવફાઈ
જીગા ના દિલ માં આગ લગાઈ
હો દૌલત ના હોય તો બેવફાઈ મળે છે
રૂપિયો જોઈ પ્રેમ હર કોઈ કરે છે
દિલ ને સમજનાર કોઈ ક્યાં મળે છે
હાચો પ્રેમ જગત માં કોઈ ક્યાં કરે છે
ઠુકરાયો પ્યાર કેમ તે યાર
પરણી બીજા હારે બાંધ્યો સંસાર
પારકું પાનેતર ઓઢી આઈ કેવી કરી તે બેવફાઈ
મારા દિલ માં આગ લગાઈ કેવી કરી તે બેવફાઈ
જીગા ના દિલ માં આગ લગાઈ

snippet.title: Hil Pori Hila | Bhau Kadam | Gautami Patil | Rohit Raut | Sonali Sonawane | Prasad Shirsath
snippet.description:
The legendary Marathi chartbuster Hil Pori Hila is back with a fresh twist! Bringing together nostalgia, electrifying beats, and power-packed performances by Bhau Kadam and Gautami Patil, this vibrant recreation is guaranteed to get you dancing. Turn up the volume and join the celebration! 🎶

हिल पोरी हिला हे रोहित राऊत आणि सोनाली सोनावणे यांच्या आवाजातील जोशपूर्ण मराठी डान्स गीत आहे. प्रसाद शिर्साठ यांचे संगीत आणि भाऊ कदम व गौतमी पाटील यांचा धमाकेदार अंदाज गाण्याला खास रंगत आणतो.

आता सारेगामा मराठी चॅनेलला सब्सक्राईब करा आणि मराठी संगीताच्या आनंद घ्या ! 👉🏻https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJSX0gNr2U5lawLXE6IjRmA 💜

Audio Credits:
Singers: Rohit Raut & Sonali Sonawane 
Composer : Prasad Shirsath 
Music Arranged, Produced & Conducted by Prasad Ravindra Shirsath
Lyrics: Smita Kulkarni & Prasad Shirsath
Programming: Ayush Raut
Dholki: Parth Padekar
Chorus: Ganesh Bagul, Ashutosh Suryawanshi, Anupam Chinchore, Rushi Narvekar & Malhar Beloshe
Scratch Vocal: Tushar Londhe
Audio Manager: Rupesh Shirode
Vocals Recorded at:
Sound Ideaz Studio, Mumbai by Vinayak Pawar (Rohit Raut Vocals)
AMV Recording Studio by Harsh Bhoir (Sonali Sonawane Vocals)
Mixed & Mastered by Jagdish Bhandge | Apostrophe Studios, Nashik
Audio Manager : Rupesh Shirode & Pranav Wagh

Video Credits:
Featuring : Bhau Kadam & Gautami Patil 
Video Project Head : Yogesh Kumbhar
Director: Parag Sawant
Associate Director: Ajinkya Manchekar
Assistant Direction Team: Parth Kadam
Director of Photography (DOP): Parag Sawant
Cinematography: Parag Sawant & Anirudh Bandiwadekar
Camera Assistant: Sagar Lohar
Drone: Milind Adelkar
Editor: Parag Sawant
DI: Swapnil Dhomade
Art Director: Ramaier
Assistant Art Director: Siddhesh Tendolkar
Management: Vijay Walawalkar
Production Team: Sahil Naik
Makeup: Tanvi Gosavi
Costumes: Saee Kadam
Choreographer: Srushti More
Assistant Choreographer: Samrath Gavandi
Dancers: Bhushan Bakre, Sanket Hasolkar, Tejas Pol and Pravin Kubal.
Poster - Vinayak Lokhare
Special Thanks: Nikhil Sonawane, Hornbill Nest, Vignesh Ghone, Milind Adelkar, Dr. Pranav Prabhu, Bhai Hadge, Aditya Malekar, Vishal & Harshad Lohar, Nana Keluskar & Parth Keluskar, Kritik Shirodkar, Pari & Advik Kesarkar, Siddhesh Malankar, Sachin Kondaskar, Vikas Kesarkar & Family, Prajyot Khadapkar, Prashant & Kishor Tendolkar, Bapu Rane and Manthan Mundye.

हिल पोरी हिला हे रोहित राऊत आणि सोनाली सोनावणे यांच्या आवाजातील जोशपूर्ण मराठी डान्स गीत आहे. प्रसाद शिर्साठ यांचे संगीत आणि भाऊ कदम व गौतमी पाटील यांचा धमाकेदार अंदाज गाण्याला खास रंगत आणतो.

आता सारेगामा मराठी चॅनेलला सब्सक्राईब करा आणि मराठी संगीताच्या आनंद घ्या ! 👉🏻https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJSX0gNr2U5lawLXE6IjRmA 💜

Audio Credits:
Singers: Rohit Raut & Sonali Sonawane 
Composer : Prasad Shirsath 
Music Arranged, Produced & Conducted by Prasad Ravindra Shirsath

Sound Ideaz Studio, Mumbai by Vinayak Pawar (Rohit Raut Vocals)
AMV Recording Studio by Harsh Bhoir (Sonali Sonawane Vocals)
Mixed & Mastered by Jagdish Bhandge | Apostrophe Studios, Nashik
Audio Manager : Rupesh Shirode & Pranav Wagh

Featuring : Bhau Kadam & Gautami Patil 
Video Project Head : Yogesh Kumbhar
Director: Parag Sawant
Associate Director: Ajinkya Manchekar
Assistant Direction Team: Parth Kadam

snippet.title: Tera Fitoor Jab Se Chadh Gaya Re - Lyrics | Arijit Singh | Himesh Reshammiya | Evergreen Love Song
snippet.description:
Song Credits:
Song: Tera Fitoor
Movie: Genius
Singer: Arijit Singh
Music: Himesh Reshammiya
Lyricist: Kumaar

Lyrics:
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

Tu Jo Mere Sang Chalne Lage
Toh Meri Raahe Dhadakne Lage
Dekhun Jo Na Ek Pal Main Tumhe
Toh Meri Baahein Tadapne Lage

Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

Haathon Se, Lakeere Yehi Kehti Hai
Ke Zindagi Jo Hai Meri, Tujhi Mein Ab Rehti Hai

Labon Pe Likhi Hai Mere Dil Ki Khwahish,
Lafzon Mein Kaise Main Bataaun
Ek Tujhko Hi Paane Ki Khatir,
Sab Se Juda Main Ho Jaaun

Kal Tak Maine Jo Bhi Khwaab The Dekhe
Tujh Mein Woh Dikhne Lage

Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

Saanson Ke Kinaare Bade Tanha The,
Tu Aake Inhein Chhu Le Bas 
Yehi To Mere Armaan The

Saari Duniya Se Mujhe Kya Lena Hai,
Bas Tujhko Hi Pehchaanu
Mujhko Na Meri Ab Khabar Ho Koi,
Tujhse Hi Khud Ko Main Jaanu

Raatein Nahi Kat Ti Bechain Se Hoke,
Din Bhi Guzarne Lage

Ishq Jo Zara Sa Tha Woh Badh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re
Tera Fitoor Jabse Chadh Gaya Re

bn.title: যে ম্যাচটি আমাদের সেমিফাইনালে কোয়ালিফাই করিয়েছিল 🔝🖤| WWCD-তে ১৫টি ফিনিশ| TAGHYDRO8 🔥🧿
bn.description:
হে বন্ধুরা! আশা করি আরেকটি অসাধারণ ভিডিও আপনাদের ভালো লেগেছে, যদি ভালো লেগে থাকে তাহলে একটি লাইক 👍, সাবস্ক্রাইব করতে এবং ভিডিওটিকে আরও জনপ্রিয় করতে ভুলবেন না! 🖤

আমার কোনো উন্নতি করার প্রয়োজন আছে বলে মনে হলে কমেন্টে জানাবেন 😊

আমাকে ইন্সটাগ্রামে ফলো করতে ভুলবেন না: https://www.instagram.com/hydro.bgmi?igsh=cXpmd2xic2wwMGY4&utm_source=qr

কন্ট্রোল - ৬ ফিঙ্গার ক্ল (6 Finger Claw)
জাইরোস্কোপ - সর্বদা চালু (Always On)

Song : मानसिक शांति के लिए प्रीतिदिन सुने ये प्रार्थना गीत
Publish : Subah Savere Prarthana

ईश्वर को परमात्मा कहा जाता है, अथवा यथार्थ रूप में परमात्मा को ही भगवान, रचता सर्वशक्तिमान के रूप में जाना जाता है l इसका अर्थ है कि वह सभी आत्माओं में सर्वोच्च आत्मा है। परमात्मा हम सर्व आत्माओ के पिता (father) है, जो हमे सुख और शांति का अविनाशी वर्षा देते है l आत्माओं की तरह, भगवान प्रकाश का ही एक सूक्ष्म बिंदु है, लेकिन मानव आत्माओं के विपरीत, वो आत्मा जन्म और मृत्यु के चक्र से परे है, अर्थात चक्र मे नही आते और कर्मों के फल - सुख वा दुख की अनुभूति नही करते, अर्थात वो अकर्ता है, सत्य है। भगवान सभी मानव आत्माओं का सर्वोच्च पिता, माता, शिक्षक, सखा और सतगुरु है। हम उनको केवल कठिन समय में ही याद है, यह हमारे भीतर ऐसा अंतर्निहित है। हम परमपिता को अपने दुख के समय मे ही याद करते है, यह हुमारे मन बुद्धि मे इतने तक बैठा हुआ है की वो ही हमारा शांति-दाता है।

ईश्वर को परमात्मा कहा जाता है, अथवा यथार्थ रूप में परमात्मा को ही भगवान, रचता सर्वशक्तिमान के रूप में जाना जाता है l इसका अर्थ है कि वह सभी आत्माओं में सर्वोच्च आत्मा है। परमात्मा हम सर्व आत्माओ के पिता (father) है, जो हमे सुख और शांति का अविनाशी वर्षा देते है l आत्माओं की तरह, भगवान प्रकाश का ही एक सूक्ष्म बिंदु है, लेकिन मानव आत्माओं के विपरीत, वो आत्मा जन्म और मृत्यु के चक्र से परे है, अर्थात चक्र मे नही आते और कर्मों के फल - सुख वा दुख की अनुभूति नही करते, अर्थात वो अकर्ता है, सत्य है। भगवान सभी मानव आत्माओं का सर्वोच्च पिता, माता, शिक्षक, सखा और सतगुरु है। हम उनको केवल कठिन समय में ही याद है, यह हमारे भीतर ऐसा अंतर्निहित है। हम परमपिता को अपने दुख के समय मे ही याद करते है, यह हुमारे मन बुद्धि मे इतने तक बैठा हुआ है की वो ही हमारा शांति-दाता है।

snippet.title: Aaj Se Teri - Lyrical | Padman | Akshay Kumar & Radhika Apte | Arijit Singh | Amit Trivedi
snippet.description:
Presenting the lyrical video of Aaj Se Teri.

Singer - Arijit Singh
Music - Amit Trivedi
Lyricist - Kausar Munir

Crew Names:-
Produced & Arranged by - Amit Trivedi
Recording Engineers A T Studios  Mumbai  - Abhishek Sortey & Urmila Sutar 
Assisted by  Firoz Shaikh
Mixed by - Shadab Rayeen,  A T Studios & New Edge - Mumbai Assisted by : Abhishek Sortey & Dhananjay Khapekar
Mastered by - Donal Whelan, Masteringworld - U.K.
Executive Producer A T Studios - Krutee Trivedi
Head Of Production A T Studios - Aashish Narula

Musician Names:-
Programmed by Amit Trivedi, Gourab Dutta & Raja Rasaily
Dholak & Percussions - Sanket Naik  
Mandolin, Saz & Bouzouki - Tapas Roy  
Shehnai - Omkar Dhumal

Cast - Akshay Kumar, Radhika Apte & Sonam Kapoor
Production House - Hope Production Pvt Ltd
Producer - Twinkle Khanna, SPE Films India, KriArj Entertainment, Cape Of Good Films & Hope Productions
Director - R Balki

Lyrics:
Mukhda -
Aaj Se Teri Saari Galiyaan Meri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Mera Ghar Tera Ho Gaya…

Aaj Se Teri Saari Galiyaan Meri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Mera Ghar Tera Ho Gaya…
Aaj Se Meri Saari Khushiyaan Teri Ho Gayi,
Aaj Se Tera Gum Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tera Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se Tera Ho Gaya. 

Antara 1- 
Tere Maathe Aaaaa….Tere Maathe Ke Kumkum Ko
Main Tilak Lagaa Ke Ghoomoonga, 
Teri Baali Ki Chhunchhun Ko
Main Dil Se Lagaa Ke Jhoomoonga…

Meri Chhoti Si Bhoolon, 
Ko Tu Nadiya Mein Baha Dena.
Tere Jude Ke Phoolon Ko, 
Main Apne Shirt Mein Pehnoonga.

Bas Mere Liye Tu Maalpue Kabhi Kabhi Bana Dena…

Aaj Se Meri Saari Ratiyaan Teri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Tera Din Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tera Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se Tera Ho Gaya. 

Antara 2-
Tu Maange Sardi Mein Amiya, 
Jo Maange Garmi Mein Mungphaliyaan, 
Tu Baarish Mein Agar Keh De,
Ja Mere Liye Tu Dhoop Khila.

Toh Main Sooraj……. Toh Main Sooraj Ko Jhatak Doonga, 
Toh Main Saawan Ko Gatak Loonga,
Toh Saare Taaron Sang Chanda
Main Teri Goad Mein Rakh Doonga-

Bas Mere Liye Tu Khil Ke Kabhi Muskuraa Dena…

Aaj Se Meri Saari Sadiyaan Teri Ho Gayi, 
Aaj Se Tera Pal Mera Ho Gaya. 

Ho Tere Kandhe Ka Jo Til Hai, 
Ho Tere Seene Mein Jo Dil Hai, 
Ho Teri Bijli Ka Jo Bill Hai-
Aaj Se Mera Ho Gaya…

Ho Mere Khwaabon Ka Ambar,
Ho Meri Khushiyon Ka Samandar,
Ho Mere Pin Code Ka Number-
Aaj Se ……Tera Ho Gaya.

Welcome to Bollywood Love Junction 🎶❤️
Your ultimate destination for the most beautiful and timeless Bollywood romantic songs. From soulful melodies 🎧 to heart-touching love tracks 💕, we bring you the magic of romance from Hindi cinema.

#PadmanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #AkshayKumarSongs #NewHindiSongs

snippet.title: *OMG*THE MOST EXPENSIVE CAR… $100M!😱1000+ SUPER WHEEL SPIN | FORZA HORIZON 6
snippet.description:
🔥 I MODIFIED the Koenigsegg Jesko and pushed it to insane top speed — 567+ KMPH in Forza Horizon 6! 😱
In this video, I’m using the Logitech G29 steering wheel for a super realistic driving experience and going full send on the highway/top speed run.

Agar aapko Forza Horizon 6 tuning, Jesko top speed build, wheel gameplay, aur crazy high-speed runs pasand hain, then this one is for you!
India + US Forza community, let’s see if we can hit even more speed comment your best top speed and your setup! 👇

What’s inside this video
Koenigsegg Jesko modified / tuned build
567+ KMPH top speed attempt
Logitech G29 wheel + cockpit style gameplay
Smooth highway pulls, control + handling at extreme speed

Mere Armaano Ko Tune Jala Diya, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

📌 Recommended For:
90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans

Agar aapko ye gana pasand aaye to:
👍 Like karein
💬 Comment me apni feelings share karein
🔔 Channel ko subscribe karein
❤️ Is song ko apne pyaar ke saath share karein

indian romantic song

Mere Armaano Ko Tune Jala Diya, 90s style deep love romantic Hindi song hai jo dil ke sabse gehre jazbaat ko bayan karta hai. Ye gana un logon ke liye hai jo true love, one-side love, pure emotions aur soulful romance ko mehsoos karte hain. Is gaane me wahi purana Bollywood 90s ka magic hai — jahan mohabbat shor nahi karti, balki khamoshi me bhi bol jaati hai ❤️

Agar aapko 90s romantic songs, deep love songs, heart touching Hindi songs aur emotional Bollywood love music pasand hai, to ye song aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo jaayega.
Is gaane ka har lafz pyaar, dard aur sukoon ko ek saath mehsoos karata hai.

Tere Naam Mein Mera Sukoon un yaadon ko wapas le aata hai jab gaane sirf sunne ke liye nahi, balki mehsoos karne ke liye bane hote the.
Ye gana un logon ke liye hai:

Jo saccha pyaar karte hain

Jo aaj bhi 90s Bollywood ke deewane hain

Jo romantic aur soulful songs sunna pasand karte hain

Jo apni feelings shabdon me nahi keh paate


🎶 Song Feel:
Romantic | Emotional | Deep Love | 90s Bollywood Vibes

📌 Recommended For:
90s Hindi Songs lovers, Romantic reels, Love status videos, Emotional edits, Bollywood nostalgic songs fans

Agar aapko ye gana pasand aaye to:
👍 Like karein
💬 Comment me apni feelings share karein
🔔 Channel ko subscribe karein
❤️ Is song ko apne pyaar ke saath share karein

Lyrics: - 
Ek aave neem ki daali mere supne me,
Ek gher padya kati khaali mere supne me,
Ek arhad bhari trolley mere supne me,
Sarso ke fool ki baali mere supne me,
Ek choolhe aage poti maa,
Va swaad haath ki roti kaa,
Ek kolhu waala khet mera,
Milge das khogya ek mera,
Ek sooraj chhupta khet jageshar waale me,
Ek dibiya ki loh jaldi dikhe aale me,
Ve dhari paam ki kali kaath ke taale me,
Fir fasgya bachpan chakachaundh ke jaale me,
Beshak kabje me jang lagi,
Ek khula aaj bhi kuwaad pada,
Ek charkha khaa liya deemak ne,
Par Dekhe meri baat khadya,
Ek rove baja heer heer chillave hai,
Ar time ki sui teer se tode jaave hai,
Mera mann dariya me dooba ghadwa sohni ka,
Mera ghar paaro sa dev das killave hai,

Re kaaya khaali deemak ne,
Bacha kuch dhore na mere,
Oh kaaga sunta jaiyo re,
Tu kaaga sunta jaiyo re.
Re kaaya khaali deemak ne,
Bacha kuch palle na mere,
Oh kaaga sunta jaiyo re,
Tu kaaga sunta jaiyo re.

भारतीय संस्कृति से भारतीय HIP HOP 🍁 

🫶INSTAGRAM🫶
https://www.instagram.com/iam_raanjha
───────────────────────── 

🙏🏻 SPOTIFY🙏🏻
https://appopener.com/sp/bls0q3csd
───────────────────────── 

🍁 Credits 🍁 

🔷 Song :- Sankatmochan Hanuman
🔷 Lyrics & Composition :- Raanjha
🔷 Rap Vocals :- Raanjha
🔷 Chorus Vocals : Team A Cube Music
🔷 Intro Vocal :- Ras Raja Ji Maharaj
🔷 Music :- Smokey
🔷 Mix and Master :- A Cube Music
🔷 Video :- Sacred Guy
──────────────────────────
-: LYRICS :- 

-: RAP 1 :- 

Hanuman ke hote prabhu aapne
Soch liya ye kaise ke
Yamraj aaj swayam praan humare
Lakshman ji ke le lenge
Kya nahi bharosa aapko
Aapke daas ki shakti pe prabhu
Mai prithvi uthal puthal kardu
Aap ek baar jo keh denge 

Haan Aaj agar ho aagya to
Vidhi ka har vidhan palat du
Aap kaho Sanjeevani kya
Mai chandra Nichod ke amrit laadu 

Kaal ho chahe saamne aaj
Na lakhan ko kuch hone dunga
Or Aap kehte ho maut aayegi
Mai Maut ke praan hi le lunga 

Are shakti na meri kaam ki
Jo na kaam aaye mere ram ke
Aaj to lankapati bhi
Hath ki shamta dekhega hanuman ki 

Ha wo Suryadev to jaante hai
Bajrangi ke nischay ki shamta
Gar aaj huye wo uday
To Prithvi ka antim suryoday hoga 

Wo Ast honge wo trast honge
Meri krodh ki agni me bhasm honge wo
Balyakal me to graas le chhoda
Ab to pure nasht honge wo 

Nishchint rahiye aap parabhu
Abhi jivit hai ye daas prabhu
Mai Bhor se pehle le aau
Sanjeevani aapke pass prabhu 

Haa Gaad k per or le chalaang
Rakh peeth gada chale Hanuman
Dhooji dharti parlay ho jese
Or aakash me goonje jai shree ram 

-: HOOK :- 

रामरामं जपति हनुमान ।
अतुलितबलधामम हनुमान ।
महाकालशम्भोरवतारः ।
मृत्योरपि कालो हनुमान ॥ 

Jape ram ram Bajrangbali
Atulit baldham Bajrangbali
Avtaar rudra mahakaal shambhu
Mrityu ke kaal Bajrangbali 

Siye ram milaye Bajrangbali
Punah Lakhan jiyaye Bajrangbali
Shree ram rame hai rom
Seena faad dikhaye Bajrangbali 

-: RAP 2 :- 

Khabar suni jab bajrangi ki
Hil gayi lanka lankeshwar ki
Subah se pehle hanuman hi
Laa sakta hai Sanjeevani boonti 

Shakti ki uski tha nahi
Wo to mrityu se bhi darta nahi
Hai na markat wo sadharan
Uske jesa koi dooja nahi 

Haan Ghabraya Dashanan bhi bheja
Kaalnemi ko maarg me unke
Jo ram ram jape saadhu ban
Hanuman ruke naam ram ka sunke 

Chhal se maar dega kaalnemi
Hanuman ko ravan soch laga ye
Bajrangi ne ek prahar se daitya
Faad feka lanka ki sabha me 

Hey Ravan aaj tu baadha bhej
Haan Ek se bhi tu zyada bhej
Saugandh mujhe hai ram ki
Lanka lautunga boonti samet 

Na kiya vilamb aaye dronagiri
Sanjeevani boonti ko na jaante
Gaad ke haath dhara me chale
Ukhaad ke parvat ek haath se 

Na maathe pe ek boond pasina
Chere pe koi ek shikan na
Ek haath me gada ek me parwat
Par muskan ruke na 

Chale maruti vaayu gati se
Kshan bhar me hi pahuch gaye lanka
Praan bachaye lakhan ke
Fir se baja diya ram naam ka danka 

-: OUTRO :- 

हरषि राम भेंटेउ हनुमाना। अति कृतग्य प्रभू परम सूजाना
तुरत बैद तब कीन्ह उपाई। उठि बैठे लछिमन हरषाई 

हृदयॅ लाइ प्रभू भेंटेउ भ्राता। हरषे सकल भालु कपि ब्राता
कपि पुनि बैद तहाँ पहुँचावा। जेहि बिधि तबहिं ताहि लइ आवा 

─────────────────────────

snippet.title: എക്കാലത്തെയും മികച്ച പ്രണയഗാനങ്ങൾ | 80s & 90s Malayalam Evergreen Jukebox
snippet.description:
Old Malayalam Songs, Pazhayakaala Paattukal, Evergreen Malayalam Songs, Malayalam Golden Hits, Classic Malayalam Songs, Malayalam Old Songs Collection & Timeless Evergreen Melodies come together in this nostalgic Malayalam Audio Jukebox. ❤️

Relive the magic of unforgettable Malayalam classics filled with soulful melodies, romantic evergreen hits, vintage film songs, and heart-touching musical moments that have stayed timeless across generations. From peaceful melodies to iconic old Malayalam hits, this jukebox brings pure nostalgia and relaxation for every music lover. 🎶

✨ In This Malayalam Evergreen Jukebox:
• Old Malayalam Film Songs
• Evergreen Romantic Melodies
• Malayalam Golden Classics
• Timeless Vintage Hits
• Relaxing Feel Good Songs
• Nostalgic Malayalam Melodies
• Old Is Gold Malayalam Songs
• Soulful Evergreen Favorites

snippet.title: Unstable SMP: Civil War FINALE
snippet.description:
After I Became King of the Unstable SMP, the world split into two different sides: the new players, and the old ones. After the old players took control of Highwater city, they began invading different cities across my kingdom... this time with a different strategy. This is Unstable SMP: Civil War FINALE. 

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  ‪  ‪‪ @FlameFragsMC 
➜      @wemmbumc 
➜     ‪‪ @Spokeishere 
➜      @ParrotX2 

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video:  @FlameFragsMC @wemmbumc @TheobaldTheBird @saparata @Lomedy @fymada  

Original Intro Song by @tsynphonia 

Blimp design: https://youtu.be/IZTobBVAJ6U?si=ZxKF8R9OQSHcCu1y 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Aadhe Pe Main So Gai

Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Deepak Ataari Pe Jalata Toh Hoga
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Apano Paraayo Nazar Na Aayo 
Bhool Kaise Ho Gai Tujhase Dulariya

Choor Thi Main Din Bhar Ki Thakan Se

snippet.title: ভয়ংকর JCB Innova Truck Vs Horror JCB Tractor | Horror Car Attack | Indian Bike Driving 3D
snippet.description:
ভয়ংকর JCB Innova Truck Vs Horror JCB Tractor | Horror Car Attack | Indian Bike Driving 3D

এই ভিডিওতে দেখবে একদম insane horror fight যেখানে JCB Innova Truck আর Horror JCB Tractor এর মধ্যে শুরু হলো ভয়ংকর attack! 🚚💀🔥

snippet.title: Duniya Bole - Rekha Bhardwaj | Priya Saraiya | Vaarso Season 4
snippet.description:
Duniya Bole Ene Bolva Daiye is a devotional piece rooted in the fearless and unconditional love of Meerabai. At its core, the bhajan translates to:
“Let the world say what it wants… I will remain immersed in my devotion.”
The song expresses - Detachment from societal judgment

In Vaarso Season 4, this bhajan takes on a fresh identity. Brought to life by the textured,
emotive voice of Rekha Bharadwaj, and layered with the innocence and purity of children’s voices.

This song is a bridge between tradition and a new sonic identity.
🌸🌸🌸

Original creation of - Meera bai 

Composition: Traditional & Priya Saraiya
Lyrics: Traditional & Priya Saraiya
Singers: Rekha Bhardwaj
Kids chorus : Aaditya Bhogayta, Aarna Hathi, Dhun Pota, Krish Shah, Mahit Saraiya, Navya Vayeda
Music Arrangement & Production: Jay Mavani
Violin: Jitendra Hansraj Javda
Guitars & Strokes: Indrajit Chetia
Mixing & Mastering Engineer: Rahul Agrawat at Echohive Studios
Recording Engineers: Amey Londhe at The Sanctuary Audio Visual Studio, Kalpesh Kerkar at Seven Heaven Studios.

Conceptualization, Creative Direction & Production
by 32 Farvari Production

Director & DOP: Bhaveshkummar
Assistant DOP: Chintan Patel, Bhagyashri Thakkur
Editing, DI : Bhagyashri Thakkur
Set Design, Creative Direction: Rupalli Thakurr
Art Team: Megha Banker, Chhayaxi Tailor, Devanshi Rathod, Hitisha Wadhwani

localized.title: Duniya Bole - Rekha Bhardwaj | Priya Saraiya | Vaarso Season 4
localized.description:
Duniya Bole Ene Bolva Daiye is a devotional piece rooted in the fearless and unconditional love of Meerabai. At its core, the bhajan translates to:
“Let the world say what it wants… I will remain immersed in my devotion.”
The song expresses - Detachment from societal judgment

In Vaarso Season 4, this bhajan takes on a fresh identity. Brought to life by the textured,
emotive voice of Rekha Bharadwaj, and layered with the innocence and purity of children’s voices.

This song is a bridge between tradition and a new sonic identity.
🌸🌸🌸

Original creation of - Meera bai 

Composition: Traditional & Priya Saraiya
Lyrics: Traditional & Priya Saraiya
Singers: Rekha Bhardwaj
Kids chorus : Aaditya Bhogayta, Aarna Hathi, Dhun Pota, Krish Shah, Mahit Saraiya, Navya Vayeda
Music Arrangement & Production: Jay Mavani

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

localized.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
localized.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

Title: Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho
Singer: 
Music Director: 
Lyrics: Traditional

Song Lyrics:
जो में ऐसा जानती, प्रीत करे दुःख होये
Jo Mein Aisa Janti, Preet Kare Dukh Hoye
नगर में ढिंढोरा पीट ती, प्रीत ना करीओ कोई
Nagar Dhindora Peet Ti, Preet Na Kario Koi

इक बार तो राधा बनकर देखो मेरे साँवरिया
Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho Mere Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe
इक बार तो राधा बनकर देखो मेरे साँवरिया
Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho Mere Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe

क्या होते हैं आंसू, क्या पीड़ा होती है
Kya Hote Hain Aasoo, Kya Peeda Hoti Hai
क्यूँ दर्द उठता है, क्यूँ आँखे रोती है
Kyun Dard Uthta Hai, Kyun Aankhen Roti Hai
क्या होते हैं आंसू, क्या पीड़ा होती है
Kya Hote Hain Aasoo, Kya Peeda Hoti Hai
क्यूँ दर्द उठता है, क्यूँ आँखे रोती है,
Kyun Dard Uthta Hai, Kyun Aankhen Roti Hai

इक बार आंसू तो बहा कर देखो साँवरिया,
Ek Baar Aansoo Toh Baha Kar Dekho Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe
इक बार तो राधा बनकर देखो मेरे साँवरिया
Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho Mere Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe

जब कोई सुनेगा ना, तेरे मन के दुखड़े
Jab Koi Sunega Na, Tere Mann Ke Dukhde
जब ताने सुन सुन कर, होंगे दिल के टुकड़े
Jab Tane Sun Sun Kar, Honge Dil Ke Tukde
जब कोई सुनेगा ना, तेरे मन के दुखड़े,
Jab Koi Sunega Na, Tere Mann Ke Dukhde
जब ताने सुन सुन कर, होंगे दिल के टुकड़े
Jab Tane Sun Sun Kar, Honge Dil Ke Tukde

इक बार जरा तुम ताने सुनकर देखो साँवरिया,
Ek Baar Jara Tum Tane Sunkar Dekho Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe
इक बार तो राधा बनकर देखो मेरे साँवरिया
Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho Mere Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe

क्या जानोगे मोहन, तुम प्रेम की भाषा
Kya Janoge Mohan, Tum Prem Ki Bhasha
क्या होती है आशा, क्या होती निराशा
Kya Hoti Hai Asha, Kya Hoti Nirasha

इक बार जरा तुम प्रेम करके देखो साँवरिया
Ek Baar Jara Tum Prem Karke Dekho Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe

पनघट पे मधुबन में, वो इन्तजार करना
Panghat Pe Madhuban Mein, Woh Intezaar Karna
कही श्याम तेरे खातिर, वो घुट घुट के मरना
Kahin Shyam Tere Khatir, Woh Ghut Ghut Ke Marna
पनघट पे मधुबन में, वो इन्तजार करना
Panghat Pe Madhuban Mein, Woh Intezaar Karna
कही श्याम तेरे खातिर, वो घुट घुट के मरना
Kahin Shyam Tere Khatir, Woh Ghut Ghut Ke Marna

इक बार किसी का इन्तजार कर देखो साँवरिया
Ek Baar Kisi Ka Intezaar Kar Dekho Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe
इक बार तो राधा बनकर देखो मेरे साँवरिया
Ek Baar Toh Radha Bankar Dekho Mere Sawariya
राधा यूं रो रो कहे
Radha Yun Ro Ro Kahe

साँसों में राधा है
Saanson Mein Radha Hai
धड़कन में राधा है
Dhadkan Mein Radha Hai
राधा बिना देखो
Radha Bina Dekho
यह श्याम आधा है
Yeh Shyam Aadha Hai

दरपन भी है राधा
Darpan Bhi Hai Radha
दर्शन भी है राधा
Darshan Bhi Hai Radha
कान्हा नित नित बोले
Kanha Nit Nit Bole
मेरा रोम रोम राधा
Mera Rom Rom Radha

हो हो हो हो
Ho Ho Ho Ho
राधा का हर आंसू
Radha Ka Har Aansoo
प्रेम की पीड़ा बनकर के
Prem Ki Peedha Bankar Ke
कान्हा की आँखों से बहे
Kanha Ki Aankhon Se Bahe

ख़ाली हमके सतावातारा, नया छोकरी पटावातारा
